message:
test(fnp-python): swapaxes/moveaxis AxisError regression probe

Both swapaxes and moveaxis already fall back to numpy on Err in their
in-Rust fast paths, so numpy's AxisError surface is preserved. This
probe is a regression gate: if a future change drops that fallback
(e.g. replaces it with map_ufunc_error), ours would start raising
ValueError while numpy raises AxisError and this test fails.
